Go to entry:

clover

n

č'it'at'

Unknown

č'it'at'

Variant

čʰitatʰ

nahni tʰihin' ha·ʔatʰaw č'it'at' to·yatiy tʰa·ŋi ye·t'aw yow we·ʔi hučen'aw yič'ŋa tʰaŋ to·yatiy

Sometimes they eat it together with clover or whatever or they eat it like that alone.

ʔamaʔ maxa·ʔat tʰihin' č'it'at' ʔamaʔ tʰihin' tʰaŋ ʔə·k'aš

And they were getting clover and they saw him.
